emails.subject: CA RESIDENTIAL
emails.body: CA RESIDENTIAL Diann Sorry about all of this confusion regarding residential customers. This guy was listed on the Ken spreadsheet (about T&D bills) as being an EES customer in November. Is this a residential account? Thanks, Jim

emails.subject: RE: CA RESIDENTIAL
emails.body: RE: CA RESIDENTIAL Thanks. Diann, I know that the last few months (year?) has been tough on all of us. I appreciate everything you've done. Thanks. Jim

emails.subject: RE: CA RESIDENTIAL
emails.body: That means a lot to me, Jim. You know I enjoy working with you and all your folks.
